case_title: PIEDAD VELIZ VS. JUAN FRANCISCO TRINIDAD

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-15-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-15-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. ROGELIO PONCE INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VELIZ, PIEDAD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRINIDAD, JUAN FRANCISCO $3,560.90 PRINCIPAL, $10.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,570.90, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO CONFORM TO PROOF. THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY FOR RENT THROUGH AND INCLUDING DECEMBER, 2010, AND REDUCED BY $345.10 AS ORDERED BY THE RENT BOARD. ISSUES PERTAINING TO RESTRAINING ORDERS ARE OUTSIDE THE JURISDICTION OF THE SMALL CLAIMS COURT, AND SHOULD BE RAISED IN DEPARTMENT 218.
